calendar.matters:
FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Off Calendar

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (400 Beale Street #806, San Francisco, Ca 94105)
Off Calendar Jul-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court stated that there is a question as to whether notice was given notice or if there is a waiver of notice. Ms. Boessenecker stated that it was e-filed yesterday (clerk confirmed that it has been filed). The sale of 100% interest was confirmed at $950,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the 2nd amended report of sale filed 7/1/16. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond has been waived.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
